parsed_output.justification: Justin is the most suspicious player due to his highly inconsistent role claims. He repeatedly switches between claiming to be the Troublemaker and the Robber, and his statements are often contradictory (e.g., claiming to have robbed himself). This pattern of deception is characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to blend into the conversation and frame other players, such as Paul, to avoid detection.
